message:
test(h3_native): fill QH3-U4 protocol conformance unit gaps (26 tests)

Add 26 gap-filling tests covering frame roundtrips, decode edge cases,
request stream state violations, connection state machine semantics,
QPACK/settings, and pseudo-header validation. Total: 44→70 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
